  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'checkManageExportColumnsViewExists',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'checkManageExportColumnsViewExists',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT CASE
           WHEN EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM   terext_slot_manage_export_columns t
                    WHERE  t.view_name = :view_name
                )
           THEN 1
           ELSE 0
       END AS cnt
FROM   dual'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'deleteChangeRequestDashboardRecords',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'deleteChangeRequestDashboardRecords',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  v_deleted PLS_INTEGER;
BEGIN
  DELETE FROM terext_slot_cr_dtls
   WHERE cr_number   = :p_cr_number
     AND slot_number = :p_slot_number;
  v_deleted := SQL%ROWCOUNT;
  IF v_deleted > 0 THEN
    COMMIT;
    :o_status        := ''Success'';
    :o_error_message := ''Slot data deleted successfully for CR Number = '' || :p_cr_number;
  ELSE
    :o_status        := ''Failed'';
    :o_error_message := ''No data found for CR Number = '' || :p_cr_number;
    RETURN;
  END IF;
END;'
      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getAllConfigDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getAllConfigDetails',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select PART_NUMBER as PART_NUM, PART_DESCRIPTION as PART_DESCRIPTION, QUANTITY as QUANTITY 
from TEREXT_SLOT_DEFAULT_CONFIG
WHERE CONFIG_NUMBER = :p_config_num AND :p_action = ''CREATE'' AND :p_status = ''Open''
UNION ALL
select PART_NUMBER as PART_NUM, PART_DESCRIPTION as PART_DESCRIPTION, QUANTITY as QUANTITY 
from TEREXT_SLOT_DEFAULT_CONFIG
WHERE CONFIG_NUMBER = :p_config_num AND :p_action = ''EDIT'' AND :p_status = ''Open''
UNION ALL
select PART_NUMBER as PART_NUM, PART_DESCRIPTION as PART_DESCRIPTION, QUANTITY as QUANTITY 
from TEREXT_SLOT_PARTS
WHERE CONFIG_NUM = :p_config_num AND :p_action = ''EDIT'' AND :p_status = ''Identified''
UNION ALL
select PART_NUMBER as PART_NUM, PART_DESCRIPTION as PART_DESCRIPTION, QUANTITY as QUANTITY 
from TEREXT_SO_LINE_DTLS
WHERE SALES_ORDER_NUM = :p_config_num AND :p_action = ''EDIT'' AND :p_status = ''Booked'''
      );

      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestCRNumLOV',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select CR_NUMBER from TEREXT_SLOT_CR_DTLS_V where 1=1 and
((UPPER (CR_NUMBER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and REQUEST_STATUS =''Submitted''
--and CR_NUMBER is not null Group by CR_NUMBER'
      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestDashboardCount',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestDashboardCount',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select
COUNT(*) as Total_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN REQUEST_STATUS=''Submitted'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Submit_Count,
SUM(CASE WHEN REQUEST_STATUS=''Approved'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Approved_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN REQUEST_STATUS=''Rejected'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Reject_count
from TEREXT_SLOT_CR_DTLS
where 1=1
and
((UPPER (REQUEST_QTR) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_req_qtr) || ''%''
OR :p_req_qtr IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_req_qtr)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_req_qtr)= UPPER(''undefined'') OR UPPER(:p_req_qtr)=''ALL'')'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestDashboardDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestDashboardDetails',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select * from TEREXT_SLOT_CR_DTLS_V where 1=1 
and
((UPPER (SLOT_NUMBER) = UPPER (:p_slot_number)
OR :p_slot_number IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SYSTEM) = UPPER (:p_system)
OR :p_system IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_system)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_system)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (PLATFORM) = UPPER (:p_product_type)
OR :p_product_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (CR_NUMBER) = UPPER (:p_cr_number)
OR :p_cr_number IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_cr_number)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_cr_number)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (REQUEST_STATUS) = UPPER (:p_request_status)
OR :p_request_status IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_request_status)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_request_status)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_TYPE) = UPPER (:p_slot_type)
OR :p_slot_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (RAISED_BY) = UPPER (:p_raised_by)
OR :p_raised_by IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_raised_by)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_raised_by)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (REQUEST_DATE) = UPPER (:p_request_date)
OR :p_request_date IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_request_date)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_request_date)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_STATUS) = UPPER (:p_slot_status)
OR :p_slot_status IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_status)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_status)= UPPER(''undefined''))
order by SLOT_NUMBER asc'
      );

      p_pattern        => 'getChangeRequestQtrDtls',

      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select ''All'' as quarter
from dual
UNION ALL
select distinct(REQUEST_QTR) as quarter from TEREXT_SLOT_CR_DTLS 
where 1=1 and
((UPPER (REQUEST_QTR) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))'
      );

      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);

      p_mimes_allowed  => '',

      p_comments       => NULL,

'select CONFIG_NUMBER as CONFIG_NUM, DEFAULT_CONFIG from TEREXT_SLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_DTLS 
where UPPER (SLOT_TYPE) = UPPER (:p_slot_type)
AND UPPER(SYSTEM) = UPPER(:p_system)
AND UPPER(PLATFORM) = UPPER(:p_platform)'
      );

OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'')

      p_etag_query     => NULL,

  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getFilteredPartialDetails',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT
  PART_NUMBER       AS PART_NUM,
  PART_DESCRIPTION  AS PART_DESCRIPTION,
  QUANTITY          AS QUANTITY,
  SLOT_TYPE         AS SLOT_TYPE,
  PLATFORM          AS PLATFORM,
  SYSTEM            AS SYSTEM,
  PROMISE_DATE,
  PARTIAL_APPROVED,
  COMMENTS
FROM TEREXT_SLOT_PARTS
WHERE PART_NUMBER IN (
  SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(:p_part_numbers, ''[^, ]+'', 1, LEVEL))
  FROM dual
  CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR(:p_part_numbers, ''[^, ]+'', 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL
)'
      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getGetNewChangeRequests',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getGetNewChangeRequests',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT
    cr_number,
    slot_number,
    request_status AS cr_status,
    TO_CHAR(request_date, ''DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI'') AS created_date,
    raised_by AS created_by
FROM
    TEREXT_SLOT_CR_DTLS
WHERE
(
      (:p_user_role = ''Marketing''
       AND request_status IN (''Approved'', ''Rejected''))
   OR (:p_user_role = ''Admin''
       AND request_status IN (''Submitted'', ''Approved'', ''Rejected''))
   OR (:p_user_role = ''Operation''
       AND request_status = ''Submitted'')
)
AND TRUNC(request_date) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 10)
ORDER BY request_date DESC'
      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDashboardConfigNum',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT CONFIG_NUMBER
FROM TEREXT_SLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_DTLS
WHERE ((UPPER (CONFIG_NUMBER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))
GROUP BY CONFIG_NUMBER'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDashboardCount',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDashboardCount',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.CONFIG_NUMBER) AS count
FROM TEREXT_SLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_DTLS a,
     TEREXT_SLOT_PLAN_DTLS b
WHERE a.CONFIG_NUMBER = b.CONFIG_NUMBER
  AND (:p_platform IS NULL OR UPPER(:p_platform) = ''UNDEFINED'' OR UPPER(:p_platform) = ''ALL'' OR a.PLATFORM = :p_platform)
  AND (:p_pd_qtr IS NULL OR UPPER(:p_pd_qtr) = ''UNDEFINED'' OR UPPER(:p_pd_qtr) = ''ALL'' OR b.PD_QTR = :p_pd_qtr)'
      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDefaultConfigDtls',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDefaultConfigDtls',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT CONFIG_NUMBER,
       CASE WHEN DEFAULT_CONFIG = ''Default'' THEN ''Yes'' ELSE ''No'' END AS DEFAULT_CONFIG,
       TO_CHAR(EFFECTIVE_FROM, ''YYYY-MM-DD'') AS EFFECTIVE_FROM
FROM TEREXT_SLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_DTLS
WHERE PLATFORM = :p_platform
AND SYSTEM = :p_system
AND SLOT_TYPE = :p_slotType'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigDefaultConfigDtls',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_BODY_TEXT CLOB;
  P_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
BEGIN
  P_BODY_TEXT := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_PKG.UPDATE_DEFAULT_CONFIG_DETAILS(
    P_BODY_TEXT => P_BODY_TEXT,
    P_STATUS => P_STATUS,
    P_MESSAGE => P_MESSAGE
  ); 
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigPartDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);

      p_pattern        => 'getManageConfigPartDetails',

      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',

      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT * FROM TEREXT_SLOT_DEFAULT_CONFIG 
WHERE CONFIG_NUMBER = :p_config'

      p_method         => 'GET',

      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT CONFIG_NUMBER as config_num,
       CASE WHEN DEFAULT_CONFIG = ''Default'' THEN ''Yes'' ELSE ''No'' END AS DEFAULT_CONFIG,
       TO_CHAR(EFFECTIVE_FROM, ''YYYY-MM-DD'') AS EFFECTIVE_FROM
FROM TEREXT_SLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_DTLS
WHERE PLATFORM = :p_platform
AND SYSTEM = :p_system
AND SLOT_TYPE = :p_slotType'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageExportColumnsViewColumns',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageExportColumnsViewColumns',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''SLOT''
        THEN t.slot_dashboard
    END AS slot_dashboard,
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''SLOT''
        THEN t.slot_dashboard_pk
    END AS slot_dashboard_pk,
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CR''
        THEN t.cr_dashboard
    END AS cr_dashboard,
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CR''
        THEN t.cr_dashboard_pk
    END AS cr_dashboard_pk,
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CONFIG''
        THEN t.config_dashboard
    END AS config_dashboard,
    CASE
        WHEN UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CONFIG''
        THEN t.config_dashboard_pk
    END AS config_dashboard_pk
FROM
    terext_slot_manage_export_columns t
WHERE
    t.view_name = :view_name
    AND (
            UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''SLOT''
        AND t.slot_dashboard IS NOT NULL
        )
        OR (
            UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CR''
        AND t.cr_dashboard IS NOT NULL
        )
        OR (
            UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CONFIG''
        AND t.config_dashboard IS NOT NULL
        )'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageExportColumnsViewName',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getManageExportColumnsViewName',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SELECT t.view_name
FROM   terext_slot_manage_export_columns t
WHERE  (
           UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''SLOT''
       AND t.slot_dashboard IS NOT NULL
       )
    OR (
           UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CR''
       AND t.cr_dashboard IS NOT NULL
       )
    OR (
           UPPER(TRIM(:input_page)) = ''CONFIG''
       AND t.config_dashboard IS NOT NULL
       )'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',

and cr_number =:p_cr_number'

      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getSupplierSites',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SElECT DISTINCT VENDORSITECODE FROM TERPO_VENDORSITES_STG where vendorid = :p_vendor_id'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getSuppliers',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);

      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getSuppliers',

      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SElECT tvs.PARTYNAME "PARTYNAME", tvs.VENDORID "VENDORID" FROM TERPO_VENDOR_STG tvs'
      );

      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'SElECT tvs.VENDORID "VENDORID" FROM TERPO_VENDOR_STG tvs WHERE tvs.PARTYNAME = :p_vendorName'
      );

      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getcustomernamelov',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select distinct(CUSTOMER) as customer_name from terext_slot_plan_dtls 
where 1=1 and
((UPPER (CUSTOMER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))
order by CUSTOMER asc'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getdashboardtotal',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getdashboardtotal',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select
COUNT(*) as Total_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN SLOT_STATUS=''Open'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Open_Count,
SUM(CASE WHEN SLOT_STATUS=''Identified'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Identified_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN SLOT_STATUS=''Booked'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Booked_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN SLOT_STATUS=''Shipped'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as Shipped_count
from terext_slot_plan_dtls
where 1=1
and
((UPPER (MRP_QTR) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_mrp_qtr) || ''%''
OR :p_mrp_qtr IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_mrp_qtr)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_mrp_qtr)= UPPER(''undefined'') OR UPPER(:p_mrp_qtr)=''ALL'')'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getexportdetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getexportdetails',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select * from TERSLOT_PLAN_DTLS_V
where 1=1
and
((UPPER (SLOT_NUMBER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_slot_number) || ''%''
OR :p_slot_number IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (PD_QTR) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_period) || ''%''
OR :p_period IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_period)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_period)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (PLATFORM) = UPPER (:p_product_type)
OR :p_product_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_TYPE) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_slot_type) || ''%''
OR :p_slot_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_STATUS) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_status) || ''%''
OR :p_status IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_status)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_status)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (CUSTOMER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_customer_name) || ''%''
OR :p_customer_name IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_customer_name)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_customer_name)= UPPER(''undefined''))'
      );

where 1=1
and
((UPPER (SLOT_NUMBER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))
or
((UPPER (CUSTOMER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))
order by SLOT_NUMBER asc'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getfiltersearch',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'getfiltersearch',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select * from terext_slot_plan_dtls where 1=1
--and
--((UPPER (SLOT_NUMBER) = UPPER (:p_slot_number)
--OR :p_slot_number IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''Search'') 
--OR UPPER(:p_slot_number)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
(
  (UPPER(:p_slot_number) IS NULL)
  OR UPPER(:p_slot_number) = UPPER(''Search'')
  OR UPPER(:p_slot_number) = UPPER(''undefined'')
  OR INSTR('','' || UPPER(:p_slot_number) || '','', '','' || UPPER(SLOT_NUMBER) || '','') > 0
)
and
((UPPER (PD_QTR) = UPPER (:p_period)
OR :p_period IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_period)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_period)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (PLATFORM) = UPPER (:p_product_type)
OR :p_product_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_product_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_TYPE) = UPPER (:p_slot_type)
OR :p_slot_type IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_slot_type)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (SLOT_STATUS) = UPPER (:p_status)
OR :p_status IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_status)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_status)= UPPER(''undefined''))
and
((UPPER (CUSTOMER) = UPPER (:p_customer_name)
OR :p_customer_name IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_customer_name)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_customer_name)= UPPER(''undefined''))
order by SLOT_ID asc'
      );

      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select ''All'' as quarter
from dual
UNION ALL
select distinct(MRP_QTR) as quarter from terext_slot_plan_dtls 
where 1=1 and
((UPPER (MRP_QTR) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
OR :p_searchvalue IS NULL) OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''Search'') 
OR UPPER(:p_searchvalue)= UPPER(''undefined''))'

'DECLARE

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'json/collection',
      p_items_per_page =>  1000,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'select distinct(SLOT_NUMBER) as slot_number from terext_slot_plan_dtls 
where 1=1 and
UPPER (SLOT_NUMBER) LIKE  ''%''|| UPPER (:p_searchvalue) || ''%''
order by SLOT_NUMBER asc'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_BODY CLOB;
  P_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_ROWS_OUT NUMBER;
  l_body_clob CLOB;
BEGIN
  P_BODY := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_TABLE_API.PLAN_DTLS_TBL_ACTION_FROM_JSON(
    P_BODY => P_BODY,
    P_STATUS => :p_status,
    P_MESSAGE => :p_message,
    P_ROWS_OUT => :p_rows_out
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_message',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_message',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_rows_out',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_rows_out',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'planDetailsTableAction',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_status',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_status',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postAddAttachmentDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',

      p_mimes_allowed  => '',

  :p_source,
  :p_config_num);

      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postCrPartialApprove',
      p_priority       => 0,

  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postCrPartialApprove',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_IN_CRNUM VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_ACTION VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_USER VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_PARTIAL_FLAG VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_PARTIAL_BODY BLOB;
  P_OUT_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_OUT_MSG VARCHAR2(200);
BEGIN
  TERSLOT_APPROVE_PKG.CR_APPROVE(
    P_IN_CRNUM => :p_in_crnum,
    P_IN_ACTION => :p_in_action,
    P_IN_USER => :p_in_user,
    P_IN_PARTIAL_FLAG => :p_in_partial_flag,
    P_IN_PARTIAL_BODY => :body,
    P_OUT_STATUS => :p_out_status,
    P_OUT_MSG => :p_out_msg
  );
  dbms_output.put_line(''l_out-''||:p_out_status);
dbms_output.put_line(''l_msg-''||:p_out_msg);
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(

'DECLARE

      );

      );

  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postCreateSlotAction',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postCreateSlotAction',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_BODY CLOB;
  P_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_ROWS_OUT NUMBER;
BEGIN
  P_BODY := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_TABLE_API.create_slot_json_action(
    P_BODY => P_BODY,
    P_STATUS => :p_status,
    P_MESSAGE => :p_message,
    P_ROWS_OUT => :p_rows_out
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postEmailNotifyUpdateColumns',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postEmailNotifyUpdateColumns',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'BEGIN
    IF :page_type IS NULL OR TRIM(:page_type) IS NULL THEN
        :status  := ''ERROR'';
        :message := ''page_type is required.'';
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    IF UPPER(TRIM(:page_type)) = ''OPERATIONS'' THEN

        terslot_email_notify_update_pkg.notify_single_plan_update(
            p_slot_number       => :slot_number,
            p_requested_by      => :updated_by,
            p_schedule_date_str => :scheduled_date,
            p_promised_date_str => :promised_date,
            p_slot_type         => :slot_type,
            p_manufacture_site  => :manufacture_site,
            p_track_schedule    => TRUE,
            p_track_promised    => TRUE,
            p_track_slot_type   => TRUE,
            p_track_mfg_site    => TRUE,
            p_auto_commit       => TRUE
        );

    ELSIF UPPER(TRIM(:page_type)) = ''MARKETING'' THEN

        terslot_email_notify_update_pkg.notify_single_plan_update(
            p_slot_number      => :slot_number,
            p_requested_by     => :updated_by,
            p_slot_type        => :slot_type,
            p_track_schedule   => FALSE,
            p_track_promised   => FALSE,
            p_track_slot_type  => TRUE,
            p_track_mfg_site   => FALSE,
            p_auto_commit      => TRUE
        );

    ELSIF UPPER(TRIM(:page_type)) = ''DELETE'' THEN

        terslot_email_notify_update_pkg.record_change(
            p_slot_number    => TRIM(:slot_number),
            p_action_label   => ''Slot deleted'',
            p_requested_by   => NVL(:requested_by, :updated_by),
            p_operation_mode => ''INDIVIDUAL'',
            p_auto_commit    => TRUE
        );

    ELSIF UPPER(TRIM(:page_type)) = ''PARTIALS'' THEN

        IF ( :partial_part_added IS NULL OR TRIM(:partial_part_added) IS NULL )
           AND ( :partial_part_deleted IS NULL OR TRIM(:partial_part_deleted) IS NULL )
           AND ( :refurb_part_added IS NULL OR TRIM(:refurb_part_added) IS NULL )
           AND ( :refurb_part_deleted IS NULL OR TRIM(:refurb_part_deleted) IS NULL ) THEN
            :status  := ''ERROR'';
            :message := ''At least one partial/refurb add or delete flag is required.'';
            RETURN;
        END IF;

        terslot_email_notify_update_pkg.notify_partial_save(
            p_slot_number          => TRIM(:slot_number),
            p_requested_by         => :updated_by,
            p_partial_part_added   => :partial_part_added,
            p_partial_part_deleted => :partial_part_deleted,
            p_refurb_part_added    => :refurb_part_added,
            p_refurb_part_deleted  => :refurb_part_deleted,
            p_auto_commit          => TRUE
        );

    ELSE
        :status  := ''ERROR'';
        :message := ''Invalid page_type. Use OPERATIONS, MARKETING, DELETE, or PARTIALS.'';
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    :status  := ''SUCCESS'';
    :message := ''Notification recorded'';
EXCEPTION
    WHEN OTHERS THEN
        :status  := ''ERROR'';
        :message := SUBSTR(SQLERRM, 1, 4000);
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postFinanceDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postFinanceDetails',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
BEGIN
  terslot_common_util_pkg.process_data(
   :p_method,
   :p_primarykey,
    p_data => :body
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageConfigBulkUploadInsert',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageConfigBulkUploadInsert',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_PAYLOAD CLOB;
  P_CFG_ROWS NUMBER;
  P_PART_ROWS NUMBER;
BEGIN
  P_PAYLOAD := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_PKG.BULK_UPLOAD_INSERT_FROM_JSON(
    P_PAYLOAD => P_PAYLOAD,
    P_CFG_ROWS => P_CFG_ROWS,
    P_PART_ROWS => P_PART_ROWS
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageConfigConfigDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageConfigConfigDetails',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_BODY_TEXT CLOB;
  P_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
BEGIN
  P_BODY_TEXT := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_MANAGE_CONFIG_PKG.UPDATE_MANAGE_CONFIG_DETAILS(
    P_BODY_TEXT => P_BODY_TEXT,
    P_STATUS => P_STATUS,
    P_MESSAGE => P_MESSAGE
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageExportColumnsViewDetails',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postManageExportColumnsViewDetails',
      p_method         => 'GET',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
    v_op         VARCHAR2(30) := UPPER(TRIM(:operation));
    v_page       VARCHAR2(30) := UPPER(TRIM(:input_page));
    v_payload    CLOB;
    v_payload_pk CLOB;
BEGIN
    v_payload    := :export_columns_array;
    v_payload_pk := :payload_array;

    IF v_op = ''UPDATE'' THEN
        UPDATE terext_slot_manage_export_columns t
        SET
            t.slot_dashboard       = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''SLOT''
                                         THEN v_payload
                                         ELSE t.slot_dashboard
                                     END,
            t.cr_dashboard         = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''CR''
                                         THEN v_payload
                                         ELSE t.cr_dashboard
                                     END,
            t.config_dashboard     = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''CONFIG''
                                         THEN v_payload
                                         ELSE t.config_dashboard
                                     END,
            t.slot_dashboard_pk    = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''SLOT''
                                         THEN v_payload_pk
                                         ELSE t.slot_dashboard_pk
                                     END,
            t.cr_dashboard_pk      = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''CR''
                                         THEN v_payload_pk
                                         ELSE t.cr_dashboard_pk
                                     END,
            t.config_dashboard_pk  = CASE
                                         WHEN v_page = ''CONFIG''
                                         THEN v_payload_pk
                                         ELSE t.config_dashboard_pk
                                     END,
            t.updated_by           = :updated_by,
            t.updated_date         = SYSDATE
        WHERE t.view_name = :view_name
          AND v_page IN (''SLOT'', ''CR'', ''CONFIG'');

    ELSIF v_op = ''INSERT'' THEN
        INSERT INTO terext_slot_manage_export_columns (
            view_name,
            slot_dashboard,
            cr_dashboard,
            config_dashboard,
            slot_dashboard_pk,
            cr_dashboard_pk,
            config_dashboard_pk,
            created_by
        )
        VALUES (
            :view_name,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''SLOT'' THEN v_payload END,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''CR'' THEN v_payload END,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''CONFIG'' THEN v_payload END,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''SLOT'' THEN v_payload_pk END,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''CR'' THEN v_payload_pk END,
            CASE WHEN v_page = ''CONFIG'' THEN v_payload_pk END,
            :created_by
        );

    ELSE
        RAISE_APPLICATION_ERROR(
            -20001,
            ''Invalid operation; use UPDATE or INSERT.''
        );
    END IF;
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_IN_SLOTNUM VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_REFNUM VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_PARTIAL_FLAG VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_SOURCE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_USER VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_PARTIAL_BODY BLOB;
  P_OUT_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_OUT_MSG VARCHAR2(200);
BEGIN
  TERSLOT_OPERATION_TABLE_PKG.OPS_PARTIALS_DTLS(
    P_IN_SLOTNUM => :p_in_slotnum,
    P_IN_REFNUM => :p_in_refnum,
    P_IN_PARTIAL_FLAG => :p_in_partial_flag,
    P_IN_SOURCE => :p_in_source,
    P_IN_USER => :p_in_user,
    P_IN_PARTIAL_BODY => :body,
    P_OUT_STATUS => :p_out_status,
    P_OUT_MSG => :p_out_msg
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_in_partial_flag',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_in_partial_flag',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_in_refnum',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_in_refnum',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_in_slotnum',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_in_slotnum',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_in_source',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_in_source',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_in_user',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_in_user',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_out_msg',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_out_msg',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postOpsMarkPartialFlag',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_out_status',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_out_status',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postOpsMarkRefurbFlag',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postOpsMarkRefurbFlag',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_IN_SLOTNUM VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_REFNUM VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_REFURB_FLAG VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_SOURCE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_USER VARCHAR2(200);
  P_IN_REFURB_BODY BLOB;

    P_IN_SLOTNUM => :p_in_slotnum,
    P_IN_REFNUM => :p_in_refnum,

      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',

      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',

      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postSlotDashboardBulkUpdateRecords',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postSlotDashboardBulkUpdateRecords',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_BODY CLOB;
  P_STATUS VARCHAR2(200);
  P_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_ROWS_OUT NUMBER;
  l_body_clob CLOB;
BEGIN
  P_BODY := :body_text;

  TERSLOT_TABLE_API.terext_slot_bulk_update_from_json(
    P_BODY => P_BODY,
    P_STATUS => :p_status,
    P_MESSAGE => :p_message,
    P_ROWS_OUT => :p_rows_out
  );
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_TEMPLATE(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_priority       => 0,
      p_etag_type      => 'HASH',
      p_etag_query     => NULL,
      p_comments       => NULL);
  ORDS.DEFINE_HANDLER(
      p_module_name    => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern        => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method         => 'POST',
      p_source_type    => 'plsql/block',
      p_items_per_page =>  0,
      p_mimes_allowed  => '',
      p_comments       => NULL,
      p_source         => 
'DECLARE
  P_SLOT_NUMBER VARCHAR2(200);
  P_PAGE_TITLE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_PARTIAL_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_REFURB_MESSAGE VARCHAR2(200);
  P_USER_NAME VARCHAR2(200);
  P_OUT_MSG VARCHAR2(200);
BEGIN

  TEREXT_SLOT_NOTIFICATIONS_DTLS_PRC(
    P_SLOT_NUMBER => :p_slot_number,
    P_PAGE_TITLE => :p_page_title,
    P_PARTIAL_MESSAGE => :p_partial_message,
    P_REFURB_MESSAGE => :p_refurb_message,
    P_USER_NAME => :p_user_name,
    P_OUT_MSG => :p_out_msg
  );
  /* Legacy output: 
DBMS_OUTPUT.PUT_LINE(''P_OUT_MSG = '' || P_OUT_MSG);
*/ 
--  :P_OUT_MSG := P_OUT_MSG;
--rollback; 
END;'
      );
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_out_msg',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_out_msg',
      p_source_type        => 'RESPONSE',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'OUT',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_page_title',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_page_title',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_partial_message',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_partial_message',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_refurb_message',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_refurb_message',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_slot_number',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_slot_number',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      
  ORDS.DEFINE_PARAMETER(
      p_module_name        => 'SlotPlanning',
      p_pattern            => 'postSlotNotification',
      p_method             => 'POST',
      p_name               => 'p_user_name',
      p_bind_variable_name => 'p_user_name',
      p_source_type        => 'HEADER',
      p_param_type         => 'STRING',
      p_access_method      => 'IN',
      p_comments           => NULL);      


  COMMIT; 
END;
